name: Structural FEA Workflow
description: Post-processing workflow for finite element structural analysis. Demonstrates displacement, stress, and deformation visualization.

steps.name: Step 1: Inspect mesh and fields
steps.notes: Discover displacement, stress, and strain fields in the FEA result.

steps.name: Step 2: Von Mises stress visualization
steps.notes: Publication-quality rendering of von Mises stress distribution.

steps.name: Step 3: Displacement magnitude
steps.notes: Displacement field with mesh edges visible for mesh quality assessment.

steps.name: Step 4: Cross-section clip
steps.notes: Clip at x=0.05 to reveal internal stress distribution.

steps.name: Step 5: Stress hotspot identification
steps.notes: Iso-surface at 200 MPa to identify stress concentration zones.

steps.name: Step 6: Field statistics
steps.notes: Extract min/max/mean stress and displacement for safety factor calculation.

steps.name: Step 7: Stress along path
steps.notes: Stress distribution along the critical load path for fatigue analysis.
